parameters.query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, u.is_active, s.current_state, s.state_data 
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN bot_user_states s ON u.telegram_id = s.telegram_id 
WHERE u.telegram_id = '{{$json.telegram_id}}';

conditions.leftValue: ={{$items("Get User & State").length > 0 && !!$items("Get User & State")[0].json.id && Number($items("Get User & State")[0].json.is_active || 0) === 1}}

parameters.text: ❌ Akses Ditolak. Anda belum terdaftar atau akun non-aktif.

parameters.query: SELECT item_code, kode_barang, name_item, quantity, min_threshold FROM stock_gudang LIMIT 30 OFFSET 0;
SELECT id, telegram_id, name, role, is_active, created_at FROM users LIMIT 20 OFFSET 0;
SELECT u.name, l.item_code, l.quantity, l.tipe, l.created_at FROM log_transaksi l JOIN users u ON l.user_id = u.id ORDER BY l.id DESC LIMIT 30 OFFSET 0;
SELECT u.name, su.item_code, su.quantity, su.updated_at FROM stock_users su JOIN users u ON su.user_id = u.id ORDER BY u.name ASC;
INSERT INTO bot_user_states (telegram_id, current_state) VALUES ('{{$node["Normalize Payload"].json.telegram_id}}', 'ADMIN_ADD_ITEM') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_state='ADMIN_ADD_ITEM';

parameters.text:
Masukkan data item baru dengan format (pisahkan dengan spasi):
`[Item code] [Kode barang] [Name item] [Qty] [Stock minimum]`

Contoh:
`SSD 311202 "SSD SATA SAMSUNG 512 GB" 30 5`

parameters.query: SELECT item_code, quantity FROM stock_users WHERE user_id = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE telegram_id = '{{$node["Normalize Payload"].json.telegram_id}}');
INSERT INTO bot_user_states (telegram_id, current_state) VALUES ('{{$node["Normalize Payload"].json.telegram_id}}', 'STAFF_ALOKASI') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_state='STAFF_ALOKASI';

Dept/Toko:
